channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Winning ticket for $1.22 billion lottery jackpot sold in California, Mega Millions says
item.description: At least one Mega Millions player has plenty of dough to ring in the New Year after drawing the winning number.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: US children are struggling with reading
item.description: Learning to read can become exponentially more difficult for older students and adults who have fallen behind, creating grave concerns as the number of individuals struggling with literacy into high school and adulthood is increasing.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Azerbaijan's president says crashed jetliner was shot down by Russia unintentionally
item.description: Azerbaijan’s President Ilham Aliyev said Sunday that the Azerbaijani airliner that crashed last week was shot down by Russia, albeit unintentionally, and criticized Moscow for trying to “hush up” the issue for days. "We can say with complete clarity that the plane was shot down by Russia.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: These glasses let you 'see' conversations in real time
item.description: When I heard about AI glasses that let you "see" what people are saying, I was skeptical. But after trying them on, I was proven wrong.
item.dc:creator: Rich DeMuro, KRON4

item.title: Oregon men search for Sasquatch, die in Washington forest
item.description: Two men from Portland searching for Sasquatch and missing since early Christmas morning were found dead in the Gifford Pinchot National Forest, likely from exposure and being ill-prepared.
item.dc:creator: Tim Steele, KTLA 5

item.title: Supplemental Security Income payment schedule is wonky to start 2025: What to know
item.description: Regardless of when your payment comes, know that you will still receive all of your intended checks in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Tornadoes in Texas and Mississippi kill 2 and injure 6 as severe weather system moves east
item.description: A strong storm system threatened to whip up tornadoes in parts of the U.S. Southeast on Sunday, a day after severe weather claimed at least two lives as twisters touched down in Texas and Mississippi.
item.dc:creator: KREX 5

item.title: VIDEO: Driver fleeing at 120 mph slams into trooper in Florida
item.description: A driver is facing several charges after fleeing Florida Highway Patrol troopers, and slamming into their patrol vehicle at speeds over 120 mph in Tampa
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, Fox 5

item.title: Alaska woman convicted of murdering her court-appointed supervisor, police say
item.description: Authorities in Alaska announced that a woman was convicted for the 2020 murder of her court-appointed supervisor, 57-year-old Keith Huss.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Musk writes op-ed backing far-right German political party
item.description: The Tesla CEO said he has the “right” to address the country’s political climate as he has “made significant investments” in Germany’s technological and industrial sectors.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: At least 15 people injured after Florida train hits fire truck
item.description: Three firefighters and 12 Brightline passengers were injured Saturday morning following a collision between a Delray Beach Fire Rescue truck and a train.
item.dc:creator: Sierra Rains, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump appears to side with Musk, tech allies in debate over foreign workers roiling his supporters
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump appears to be siding with Elon Musk and his other backers in the tech industry as a dispute over immigration visas has divided his supporters.
item.dc:creator: Michelle L. Price, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: These are America's safest small towns: report
item.description: MoneyGeek, a personal finance site, had researchers analyze last year’s FBI crime data of more than 1,000 small towns and cities where the population is between 30,000 and 100,000.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, NewsNation

item.title: After predicting the financial growth of 2024, here's what 2 economists see in 2025
item.description: Brian Blank is a finance scholar and Fed watcher who researches how companies navigate downturns and make financial decisions, as well as how markets process information.
item.dc:creator: KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Here's how a robot massage compares to the real thing
item.description: First, you book an appointment through an app - it's sort of like getting an Uber. You pick a time and place, and it's all confirmed on the spot. A half-hour massage is $60 at the location I visited.
item.dc:creator: Rich DeMuro, KRON4

item.title: Olivia Hussey, star of 1968 film 'Romeo and Juliet,' dies at 73
item.description: Olivia Hussey, the actor who starred as a teenage Juliet in the 1968 film “Romeo and Juliet,” has died, her family said on social media Saturday. She was 73.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Winning $1.22 billion Mega Millions ticket sold in California
item.description: One lucky Californian is the state's newest billionaire after winning numbers for the $1.22 billion Mega Millions jackpot were drawn Friday night. The winning numbers were 3, 7, 37, 49, 55 and the Mega Ball number was 6. The Megaplier was 3X.
item.dc:creator: Vivian Chow, KTLA 5

item.title: Bird flu virus in Louisiana patient likely mutated to be more transmissible, CDC says
item.description: The agency, in its latest update released Thursday, said the mutations were not found in samples taken from wild birds, suggesting the virus changed over the course of the patient’s infection.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Weixel, KTLA 5

item.title: Winning ticket for $1.22 billion lottery jackpot sold in California, Mega Millions says
item.description: At least one Mega Millions player has plenty of dough to ring in the New Year after drawing the winning number.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Explosion at Tyson Foods plant leaves 1 dead, others injured
item.description: An explosion at a Tyson Foods plant in Georgia late Thursday night left one person dead and others injured.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Pitbull helps install final crystal triangles on Times Square ball ahead of New Year's Eve
item.description: The last of the crystal triangles that make up this year's Times Square New Year's Eve ball were installed on Friday morning, marking the first time in 10 years that all 2,688 were replaced at once.
item.dc:creator: BY MELISSA GOLDIN, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Pennsylvania teacher jailed in Russia formally designated as wrongfully detained
item.description: An American schoolteacher arrested in Russia on drug charges more than four years ago has been designated by the U.S. government as wrongfully detained, the State Department said Friday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: US homelessness up 18% as affordable housing remains out of reach for many people
item.description: The United States saw an 18.1% increase in homelessness this year, a dramatic rise driven mostly by a lack of affordable housing as well as devastating natural disasters and a surge of migrants in several parts of the country, federal officials said Friday.
item.dc:creator: Michael Casey, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Fox News hosts Sean Hannity, Ainsley Earhardt announce engagement
item.description: "We are overjoyed and so thankful to our families for all of their love and support during this wonderful time in our lives," the couple said.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, ABC 4

item.title: New Mega Millions jackpot stands at $1.22B after no winner during Christmas Eve drawing
item.description: The Mega Millions jackpot continues to grow after no ticket matched all six numbers drawn on Christmas Eve. The new estimated jackpot for Friday night’s drawing is $1.22 billion, California Lottery officials announced in a post on X. This is the fifth largest jackpot in the game's history.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: OpenAI whistleblower's mother wants suicide death investigation reopened
item.description: OpenAI whistleblower Suchir Balaji's death was ruled a suicide — but his family is calling on police to reopen their investigation, saying it "doesn't look like a normal situation.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Man indicted in burning death of woman inside New York City subway train: prosecutors
item.description: The indictment comes days after Sebastian Zapeta’s arrest and subsequent police questioning, in which authorities say he claimed not to know what had happened but identified himself in photos and surveillance video showing the fire being lit.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: NASA's Parker Solar Probe survives close brush with the sun's scorching surface
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — NASA's Parker Solar Probe has successfully made the closest approach to the sun, the space agency confirmed Friday. Earlier this week, the spacecraft passed within a record-breaking 3.8 million miles (6 million kilometers) of the scorching star.
item.dc:creator: ADITHI RAMAKRISHNAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Climate-friendly electricity sees big battery projects soar again for 2024
item.description: 2024 was another banner year for a source of electricity that is better for people's lungs, better for climate change and may be reaching your home when you turn on the lights or turn up the thermostat — large banks of batteries.
item.dc:creator: ALEXA ST. JOHN and MARY KATHERINE WILDEMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Most blame insurance profits and denials alongside the killer in UHC CEO death: poll
item.description: Most Americans believe health insurance profits and coverage denials share responsibility for the killing of UnitedHealthcare's CEO — although not as much as the person who pulled the trigger, according to a new poll.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Retailers, chains that announced closures in 2024
item.description: It was another tough year for restaurants and traditional brick-and-mortar retailers. Several national chains announced closures and bankruptcies in 2024 – not to mention the local small businesses that quietly shuttered around the country.
item.dc:creator: Celeste Houmard, KRON4

item.title: How faith communities can be welcoming of believers with disabilities this holiday season and beyond
item.description: The Rev. Shannon Blosser sees how his son loves church — the music, the singing, the communion. But the United Methodist pastor said his family hasn’t always felt like 11-year-old Noah, who is autistic, has been welcome.
item.dc:creator: MARIAM FAM and LUIS ANDRES HENAO, Associated Press, ABC 4
